global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos||||||||” text_text_color=”#000000″ text_line_height=”1.4em” custom_margin=”||-1px|||” text_orientation_tablet=”left” text_orientation_phone=”left” text_orientation_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI EC firmware supports a broad range of EC chip vendors, giving customers the ability to port it to many different chipsets with high performance processing power and complex features. Rooted in our many decades of experience in BIOS and keyboard controller programming, AMI EC firmware delivers advanced functionality and flexible development options.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_toggle title=”Features” open_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”$||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”24px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”!||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”24px” disabled_on=”off|off|off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700||on|||||” title_font_size=”14px” title_letter_spacing=”3px” title_line_height=”2em” closed_title_font=”Aptos|700|||||||” body_font=”||||||||” body_line_height=”1.8em” custom_margin=”20px||10px||false|false” animation_style=”slide” animation_direction=”left” animation_delay=”200ms” animation_intensity_slide=”5%” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

  • Keyboard Controller Functionality: AT and PS/2 8042 Compatible
  • ACPI Embedded Controller: Fully compatible with ACPI EC requirements
  • Smart Battery Management via SMBus interface for smart, control method batteries
  • ShareBIOS and Internal Flash support
  • C or Assembly language development
  • OEM Customization: Utilize advanced EC functionality to create unique platform functionality
  • Full source code available for development
  • Can be ported to many popular chipset reference board (CRB) designs

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_button button_url=”https://f.hubspotusercontent10.net/hubfs/9443417/Data_Sheets/Firmware_Solutions/Embedded_Controller_Data_Sheet_PUB.pdf” url_new_window=”on” AMI delivers secure, scalable, and intelligent EC Firmware solutions that simplify complexity and speed time to market. Partner with AMI today to bring your next generation mobile, ultra-mobile or embedded platform to life.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI0MDQwNSJ9fQ==@” button_text=”Contact Us” button_alignment=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url” _module_preset=”default” custom_button=”on” button_text_size=”15px” button_text_color=”#FFFFFF” button_border_width=”1px” button_border_color=”#FFFFFF” button_border_radius=”50px” button_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” button_use_icon=”off” custom_margin=”20px||0px||false|false” custom_padding=”10px|50px|10px|50px|true|true” global_colors_info=”{}” button_bg_color__hover_enabled=”on|desktop” button_bg_color__hover=”#FFFFFF” button_bg_enable_color__hover=”on” button_text_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_text_color__hover=”#000000″ button_border_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_border_color__hover=”#FFFFFF”][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
